E,S in ipairs({{496641-496640,509221-508496};{-288437+288438,989500+-989319};{-819133-(-819315);49363-48638}})do while S[-997004-(-997005)]<S[-400563+400565]do end,function()v=v+(913764+-913763)Z[v]=51087-51086 return v end,function(f)for E=553947-553946,#f,26316+-26315 do Z[f[E]]=(-643190-(-643191))+Z[f[E]]end if c then local S=c(true)local a=p(S)a[E(972259+-913079)],a[E(949761-890077)],a[E(-686820+746264)]=f,o,function()return 872844+2822587 end return S else return P({},{[E(824255-764571)]=o;[E(-231639-(-290819))]=f;[E(-468544-(-527988))]=function()return 4410903-715472 end})end end,{},function(f,E)local a=W(E)local c=function(c,P,p,d)return S(f,{c,P,p;d},E,a)end return c end return(X(-476380+1199127,{}))(a(O))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[E(368970-309197)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
